description_long: This is a modern office building complex set on a paved lot, featuring three main structures: a central multi-story office block with large, regular windows and balconies, a smaller pink rectangular building, and a brown single-story structure. The central building has a flat roof and a minimalist facade, with glass and concrete elements visible. The lot includes a row of covered parking spaces, several parked cars in various colors, and a small landscaped area with greenery. The paved area is spacious, allowing for vehicle and pedestrian movement, and the overall layout is organized and functional. The architectural style is clean and contemporary, with an emphasis on geometric forms and open sightlines.
description: A modern office building complex with three main structures, large windows, covered parking, and a paved lot. The design is clean, geometric, and functional.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main office building with large windows, adjacent smaller buildings, covered parking, and several parked cars.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pink building in the foreground, the row of parked cars, and the covered parking structures.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back sides of all three buildings, the flat roofs, and the open paved area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the brown and pink buildings, the parking area, and the rear of the main office block.
attribute_window_pattern: Regularly spaced, rectangular windows in horizontal rows, with some sections featuring floor-to-ceiling glass panels and balconies.
